_note: Chapter 8 — Angie on the Sense/Net jet: palm the dust, jack the lace raw, meet Brigitte, turn the plane.

c8_cabin.name: Sense/Net Jet — Main Cabin
c8_cabin.desc: Leather and hush at eleven kilometers, the continent crawling beneath. Piper Hill works three screens of call sheets and watches you take your 'medication' with a warmth that files reports. The dose sits in your palm like a small white lie.

c8_aft.name: Aft Cabin — Dark
c8_aft.desc: You kill the lights and let the dreams line up for review: the factory dark, torchlight on rust, a gray box breathing, a boy's voice with a nightclub in it, saying your name like a place he's keeping for you. The dreams have continuity errors. Real memories always do.
c8_aft.locked_text: Not with the network dust in your blood. Palm the dose first — make Piper believe.

c8_galley.name: Galley — 3 A.M. Coffee
c8_galley.desc: The one camera on the jet with a blind spot, which Porphyre mapped for you years ago as a going-away present. You drink real coffee in the dead angle and write Mamman Brigitte's vévé on hotel stationery from memory. The ink shouldn't matter. It matters.

c8_cockpit.name: Cockpit — Flight Plan
c8_cockpit.desc: The pilots are network people, but the aircraft, technically, answers to the talent. You give the word with your father's calm in your voice: east, then north. File it as location scouting. Sense/Net will bill the revolution as a production expense.
c8_cockpit.locked_text: Not yet. You don't know where you're going — only that it's not where they're taking you.
